text:
is an orchestral live album featuring music from the anime series Neon Genesis Evangelion.
Shirō Sagisu created and produced the music, it was recorded at the Bunkamura Orchard Hall. The album was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-390/1, it was released on 22 December 1997. http://vgmdb.net/album/19863 

It also managed to peak rank 34 in the Oricon charts, managing to make a total of 6 frequent appearances. A recording of the concert was released on Laserdisc and VHS as Evangelion Symphony (Video)
